label: Vector-search and retrieval services

node.label: Vector-search and retrieval services
node.definition: A vector-retrieval service operationalizes embedding generation, indexing, metadata filtering, approximate search, reranking, freshness, and access control.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Vector-search and retrieval services is to connect Vector databases & ANN indexes, Hybrid retrieval & reranking to downstream capabilities including Neural search, RAG & question answering.
examples: substrate for Neural search, RAG & question answering
combined with Vector databases & ANN indexes
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Vector databases & ANN indexes, Hybrid retrieval & reranking.

dependencies.rationale: Vector-search and retrieval services turns Vector databases & ANN indexes into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Vector-search and retrieval services turns Hybrid retrieval & reranking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Vector-search and retrieval services turns Distributed systems & networking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
